auth.label: User Access Token
auth.description: Hugging Face user access token sent as a Bearer token. Create one from your Hugging Face access token settings.

actions.name: generate_chat_completion
actions.description: Generate a chat completion with Hugging Face Inference Providers.

role.description: The role of the message author.

text.description: The text content for this message part.

url.description: The image URL or data URI.

content.description: The content for a chat message.

items.description: A single chat message sent to the model.

max_tokens.description: The maximum number of output tokens to generate.

seed.description: A random seed for deterministic generation.

stream.description: Whether to request a streaming response. This connector only accepts false or an omitted value.

parameters.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

tools.description: The function tools available to the model.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for generating a Hugging Face chat completion.

created.description: The creation timestamp in Unix seconds.

text.description: The first assistant text content extracted from the response.

role.description: The role of the generated message.

anyOf.description: Why Hugging Face stopped generating this choice.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: generate_embeddings
actions.description: Generate text embeddings with Hugging Face inference.

inputs.description: The list of texts to embed.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for generating Hugging Face embeddings.

embeddings.description: The embedding vectors for each input string.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the current authenticated Hugging Face user profile.

inputSchema.description: No input parameters are required for this action.

name.description: The display name of the authenticated user.

email.description: The email address returned by Hugging Face.

preferredUsername.description: The organization handle shown by Hugging Face.

organizations.description: The organizations attached to the authenticated user.

outputSchema.description: The current authenticated Hugging Face user.

actions.name: get_dataset_first_rows
actions.description: Preview the first rows of a dataset split from the Hugging Face Dataset Viewer.

dataset.description: The full dataset identifier, such as owner/dataset.

config.description: The dataset config or subset name.

split.description: The dataset split name to preview.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for previewing a Hugging Face dataset split.

dataset.description: The dataset identifier that was queried.

config.description: The dataset config that was queried.

split.description: The dataset split that was queried.

type.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

features.description: The feature list returned by the viewer.

row.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

truncatedCells.description: The cells truncated by the upstream dataset viewer.

rows.description: The row previews returned by the viewer.

actions.name: get_dataset_info
actions.description: Get detailed metadata for a Hugging Face dataset by dataset id.

dataset.description: The full dataset identifier, such as owner/dataset.

config.description: The optional dataset config or subset name.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Hugging Face dataset metadata.

features.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

splits.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

partial.description: Whether the dataset metadata was computed on a partial source.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_dataset_statistics
actions.description: Get column statistics for a dataset split from the Hugging Face Dataset Viewer.

dataset.description: The full dataset identifier, such as owner/dataset.

config.description: The dataset config or subset name.

split.description: The dataset split name to analyze.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for analyzing a Hugging Face dataset split.

partial.description: Whether the statistics were computed on only a partial source.

columnStatistics.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

statistics.description: The statistics entries returned by the viewer.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_model_info
actions.description: Get detailed metadata for a Hugging Face model by modelId.

modelId.description: The full model identifier, such as owner/model.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Hugging Face model metadata.

likes.description: The number of likes on the model card.

private.description: Whether the model repository is private.

anyOf.description: The gating mode reported by Hugging Face.

tags.description: The tags attached to the model.

task.description: The primary pipeline task for the model.

createdAt.description: A timestamp returned by Hugging Face.

lastModified.description: A timestamp returned by Hugging Face.

libraryName.description: The primary library tag for the model.

config.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

cardData.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

outputSchema.description: Detailed metadata for a Hugging Face model.

actions.name: get_space_info
actions.description: Get detailed metadata for a Hugging Face Space by repo id.

repoId.description: The full Space identifier, such as owner/space.

revision.description: The optional git revision to inspect.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Hugging Face Space metadata.

sdk.description: The SDK used by the Space.

host.description: The public host URL for the Space.

private.description: Whether the Space repository is private.

anyOf.description: The gating mode reported by Hugging Face.

likes.description: The number of likes on the Space.

models.description: The models linked from the Space.

datasets.description: The datasets linked from the Space.

tags.description: The tags attached to the Space.

createdAt.description: A timestamp returned by Hugging Face.

lastModified.description: A timestamp returned by Hugging Face.

runtime.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

cardData.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

actions.name: get_trending
actions.description: Get trending Hugging Face repositories across models, datasets, and Spaces.

limit.description: The maximum number of trending items to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Hugging Face trending repositories.

repoType.description: The repository type for the trending entry.

repoData.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

actions.name: list_datasets
actions.description: List Hugging Face datasets using user-friendly search filters.

search.description: A keyword used to search dataset names and owners.

author.description: Filter datasets by author or organization.

filter.description: Filter datasets by a Hub tag expression.

sort.description: The property used to sort results.

direction.description: The direction in which to sort results.

limit.description: The maximum number of datasets to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Hugging Face datasets.

private.description: Whether the dataset repository is private.

anyOf.description: The gating mode reported by Hugging Face.

likes.description: The number of likes on the dataset card.

tags.description: The tags attached to the dataset.

createdAt.description: A timestamp returned by Hugging Face.

lastModified.description: A timestamp returned by Hugging Face.

datasets.description: The list of matching dataset summaries.

actions.name: list_endpoints
actions.description: List Hugging Face Inference Endpoints for a namespace.

search.description: Filter endpoints by a name substring.

tags.description: Filter endpoints by a comma-separated tag list.

limit.description: The maximum number of endpoints to return.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor from a previous response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Hugging Face Inference Endpoints.

items.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.
The endpoint records returned by the API.

nextCursor.description: The cursor for the next page of results.

prevCursor.description: The cursor for the previous page of results.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: list_models
actions.description: List Hugging Face models using user-friendly search filters.

search.description: A keyword used to search model names and owners.

author.description: Filter models by author or organization.

limit.description: The maximum number of models to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Hugging Face models.

task.description: The primary pipeline task for the model.

private.description: Whether the model repository is private.

anyOf.description: The gating mode reported by Hugging Face.

likes.description: The number of likes on the model card.

lastModified.description: A timestamp returned by Hugging Face.

createdAt.description: A timestamp returned by Hugging Face.

tags.description: The tags attached to the model.

models.description: The list of matching model summaries.

actions.name: list_repo_files
actions.description: List files in a Hugging Face repository tree.

repoId.description: The full repository identifier, such as owner/repo.

path.description: The optional repository-relative path to list.

revision.description: The optional git revision to inspect.

recursive.description: Whether to recursively return all nested entries.

expand.description: Whether to request expanded commit and security metadata.

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor from a previous response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing a Hugging Face repository tree.

oid.description: The object identifier for the tree entry.

lastCommit.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

securityFileStatus.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

nextCursor.description: The cursor for the next page of results.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: list_spaces
actions.description: List Hugging Face Spaces using user-friendly discovery filters.

search.description: A keyword used to search Space names and owners.

author.description: Filter Spaces by author or organization.

filter.description: Filter Spaces by a Hub tag expression.

sort.description: The property used to sort results.

direction.description: The sort direction used by the Space listing API.

limit.description: The maximum number of Spaces to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Hugging Face Spaces.

sdk.description: The SDK used by the Space.

host.description: The public host URL for the Space.

private.description: Whether the Space repository is private.

anyOf.description: The gating mode reported by Hugging Face.

likes.description: The number of likes on the Space.

models.description: The models linked from the Space.

datasets.description: The datasets linked from the Space.

tags.description: The tags attached to the Space.

createdAt.description: A timestamp returned by Hugging Face.

lastModified.description: A timestamp returned by Hugging Face.

runtime.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

cardData.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

spaces.description: The list of matching Space summaries.
